import * as __rspack_external_externals1 from "externals1";
import * as __rspack_external_externals0 from "externals0";
var __webpack_modules__, __rspack_modules = __webpack_modules__ = ({
"./bar.js"() {

;// CONCATENATED MODULE: external "externals0"

;// CONCATENATED MODULE: ./bar.js

__rspack_external_externals0.v;

},
"./entry.js"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
module.exports.entry1 = __rspack_require("./entry1.js")
module.exports.entry2 = __rspack_require("./entry2.js")

},
"./entry1.js"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
module.exports = __rspack_require("./foo.js")
module.exports.name = "entry1"

},
"./entry2.js"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
module.exports = __rspack_require("./bar.js")
module.exports.name = "entry2"

},
"./foo.js"() {

;// CONCATENATED MODULE: external "externals1"

;// CONCATENATED MODULE: ./foo.js

__rspack_external_externals1.v;

},

});
// The module cache
var __webpack_module_cache__, __rspack_module_cache = __webpack_module_cache__ = {};

// The require function
function __rspack_require(moduleId) {

// Check if module is in cache
var cachedModule = __rspack_module_cache[moduleId];
if (cachedModule !== undefined) {
return cachedModule.exports;
}
// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)
var module = (__rspack_module_cache[moduleId] = {
exports: {}
});
// Execute the module function
__rspack_modules[moduleId](module, module.exports, __rspack_require);

// Return the exports of the module
return module.exports;

}

var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;

// startup
// Load entry module and return exports
// This entry module used 'module' so it can't be inlined
var __webpack_exports__, __rspack_exports = __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_require("./entry.js");
var __rspack_exportsentry1 = __rspack_exports.entry1;
var __rspack_exportsentry2 = __rspack_exports.entry2;
export { __rspack_exportsentry1 as entry1, __rspack_exportsentry2 as entry2 };

var __rspack_exports_default = { entry1: __rspack_exportsentry1, entry2: __rspack_exportsentry2 };
export default __rspack_exports_default;
